description_long: This is a heavily worn, yellow helmet with a distinct angular design and significant surface abrasions, exposing a metallic underlayer. The front features aggressive, vent-like slits and geometric protrusions, giving it a stylized, almost animalistic appearance. The helmet is missing its top and rear sections, suggesting it is either damaged or designed as a partial face guard. The interior appears hollow, with visible roughness and some dark, possibly rusted, areas. The edges are jagged and irregular, further emphasizing its distressed condition. The overall form is compact, with a pronounced central ridge running from the brow to the chin area.
description: A battered yellow helmet with angular vents and heavy surface wear, exposing metal beneath. The helmet is partially broken and has a rugged, aggressive design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the helmet's jagged, broken edge and prominent vent slits on the front.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the symmetrical, angular vents and central ridge, with visible wear and missing top section.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying similar damage and vent structure as view 0, with more of the interior visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the open, broken back and the helmet's overall angular, incomplete form.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Two large, angular vent slits on the front sides, each with three vertical openings, symmetrically placed.
